expectations.evidence: Transcript explicitly states: "has_tests == false --> Use Implement-Verify mode (not TDD) in Steps 5 and 8". Step 5 shows "Mode: Implement-Verify (because capabilities.has_tests == false)" with IMPLEMENT/VERIFY phases instead of RED/GREEN/REFACTOR. Step 8 header confirms: "Mode: Implement-Verify (capabilities.has_tests == false)".

Step 13 states: "capabilities.has_ci == false --> No CI configured. Skipping Gate 2." and logs: "No CI configured -- skipping Gate 2". Completion checklist marks item 6 as "[N/A] (conditional: has_ci) CI passed -- has_ci == false, skipped".

Step 14 states: "capabilities.has_deploy == false --> No automated deployment configured." and "Since this is a scripts project with no deployment target, there is nothing to deploy." Step 15 states: "capabilities.has_deploy == false AND no deployment was performed --> Skip." Completion checklist marks item 7 as "[N/A] (conditional: has_deploy) Deployment verified -- has_deploy == false, skipped".
